intro.title: Introduction
paragraphs: An open-source artifact repository for RISC-V, enabling a reliable supply of RISC-V-targeted software packages.
With centralized indexing and mirror distribution, it helps developers reliably fetch and keep RISC-V software up to date.

RuyiRepo utilizes the self-developed engine ForgeStash to host open-source artifacts. Tailored for a specific ecosystem, RuyiRepo provides services in the form of repository groups. Each group includes a repository hosting RISC-V 64-bit architecture artifacts and at least one proxy repository linked to other open-source artifact repositories (primarily used to fetch architecture-independent open-source artifacts). This design aims to simplify user operations by eliminating the need to configure multiple repositories.
